---
title: "Quarto Live SQL - Grundlagen"
format: html
---

```{ojs}
1 + 1;    
x = 5;
y = 5;         
x+y; 
({ a: 1 });

```

```{ojs}
btn = {
const b = document.createElement("button");
b.textContent = "Click me";
b.onclick = () => alert("clicked");
return b;
}

```


```{ojs}
counter = {
let n = 0; // State: lebt im Closure

const wrap = document.createElement("div");
wrap.style.display = "flex";
wrap.style.gap = "0.5rem";
wrap.style.alignItems = "center";

const label = document.createElement("span");
label.textContent = "n = " + n;

const b = document.createElement("button");
b.textContent = "+1";

const rb = document.createElement("button");
rb.textContent = "Reset n";

rb.onclick = () => {
    n = 0;
    label.textContent = "n = " + n ;
}

b.onclick = () => {
n = n + 1;                 // State ändern
label.textContent = "n = " + n; // UI aktualisieren
};

wrap.append(label, b, rb);
return wrap;
}

```

```{ojs}
historyDemo = {
const history = []; // State (Strings)

const div = document.createElement("div");

const btn = document.createElement("button");
btn.textContent = "Add";

const clearBtn = document.createElement("button");
clearBtn.textContent = "Clear";
clearBtn.style.marginLeft = "0.5rem";

const ul = document.createElement("ul");

btn.onclick = () => {
const text = "Eintrag " + (history.length + 1);
history.push(text);


const li = document.createElement("li");

const entryBtn = document.createElement("button");
entryBtn.textContent = text;

// später wichtig für REPL:
entryBtn.onclick = () => {
  alert("Clicked: " + text);
};

li.appendChild(entryBtn);
ul.appendChild(li);
};

clearBtn.onclick = () => {
history.length = 0;   // State leeren
ul.innerHTML = "";    // UI leeren
};

div.append(btn, clearBtn, ul);
return div;
}

```
